name: Browser Control
description: Control a browser for automation. Supports dynamic inputs for AI-driven agents.
doc:
Automate browser interactions programmatically.

Actions:
• goto - navigate to URL
• click - click element by CSS selector
• type - enter text into input field
• scroll - scroll the page
• screenshot - capture page image
• wait - wait for element to appear
• get_html - get page HTML content
• evaluate - run custom JavaScript

AI Agent Support:
All properties can be overridden by inputs, allowing AI models to dynamically control the browser based on page content.

Tip: Chain multiple Browser Control nodes for complex automation sequences.

inputs.name: Action
inputs.description: Dynamic action (overrides property): goto, click, type, scroll, screenshot, wait, get_html, evaluate

inputs.name: Value
inputs.description: Dynamic value for type action (overrides property)

properties.name: Action
properties.description: Action to perform (can be overridden by input)

properties.name: Selector
properties.description: CSS selector or URL (can be overridden by input)

properties.name: Value
properties.description: Text to type or script to run (can be overridden by input)
